# Soupy (SoupyLab)

> Soupy is a no-code AI platform for building specialist Small Language Models (SLMs), AI agents, and multi-model pipelines from plain English. Train on your data, deploy to web, Android, or fully offline on-device.

Soupy turns plain-English descriptions into trained, deployable AI modules. Users design single-purpose agents, wire them into pipelines, and ship them to the web, an Android phone, or their own PC — without writing code. The platform includes the SLM Lab (fine-tune small models on your data), Image Forge (multi-agent visual workflows), and a credit-based pay-as-you-go economy.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, hero, social proof, and primary calls to action.
- [Make a Specific SLM](/quick-slm): Pay-once flow to spec and download a ready-to-train Small Language Model bundle.
- [Compile Training Pairs](/quick-pairs): Generate clean training pair datasets in JSONL from a description.
- [SLM Lab](/slm-lab): The full Small Language Model training workspace — data, train, test, export, deploy.
- [Private AI Model](/private-ai-model): Build a private model you own end-to-end, including bring-your-own base models.
- [Offline LLM](/offline-llm): Run language models 100% on-device with WebGPU and WebLLM.
- [Train Your Own LLM](/train-your-own-llm): Guide to training your own model on your dataset.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription tiers, credit packs, and pay-as-you-go pricing.
- [Install](/install): Install Soupy as a PWA or Android app.
- [Module Builder Demo](/demo/module-builder): Public interactive demo of the visual module builder.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
